note_main_file: id=30 Improved Arcane Shot (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[2048,0,0] CONFIRMED CORRECT. But max_rank=5 WRONG (WotLK is 3 ranks) and value_per_rank=3 WRONG (WotLK is +5%/rank). Both corrected in main file.
id=31 Efficiency (spec_tree=-1) — all-ones, carrier=13165. AotH confirmed SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER [1048576,0,0]. verified=true.

id=32 Improved Aimed Shot (spec_tree=-1) — INVALID ENTRY. carrier=14287 is Arcane Shot rank X (flags=[2048,0,0]), NOT Aimed Shot. 'Improved Aimed Shot' does not exist as a multi-rank talent in WotLK 3.3.5a (Aimed Shot is a single-rank trained ability). Entry moved to main-file _todo.
id=33 Lethal Shots (spec_tree=-1) — all-ones, CRIT_CHANCE FLAT +100. Confirmed carrier 3044 SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER. verified=true.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Hunter family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_14287: ID 14287 returns 'Arcane Shot' SpellFamilyFlags: 0x00000800 — identical to 3044. It is a higher rank of Arcane Shot, not Aimed Shot. The actual Aimed Shot base spell ID needs separate verification (.spellinfo all 19434 is the TBC/Classic base; WotLK may differ).

confirmed_flags.Aspect_of_the_Hawk_13165: [1048576,0,0] = 0x00100000 (mask0 bit20) — confirms SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER for main-file id=31
confirmed_flags.Arcane_Shot_3044: [2048,0,0] = 0x00000800 (mask0 bit11) — confirms main-file id=30 flags CORRECT
confirmed_flags.Arcane_Shot_14287: [2048,0,0] = 0x00000800 — same as 3044; ID 14287 is another Arcane Shot rank, NOT Aimed Shot; invalidates main-file id=32

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Concussive Shot (5r, tier 1) — Gives Concussive Shot a 4/8/12/16/20% chance to daze target. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Focused Aim (3r, tier 1) — Reduces mana cost of Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot, and Chimera Shot by 4/7/10%. Non-linear progression (4/7/10), not modelable with linear value_per_rank.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Hunter's Mark
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1024,0,0]=0x00000400 (mask0 bit10). No shared Hunter marker bits. Hunter's Mark AP bonus +10%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 10).

talent_affixes.name: Lethal Shots
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — ranged attack crits cannot be targeted as a Hunter SpellMod sub-type; all-ones is the only viable scope. Carrier Arcane Shot(3044) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER. Hunter spell crit +1%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Efficiency
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — WotLK Efficiency reduces pet attack mana costs; pet spells are SPELLFAMILY_GENERIC and cannot be targeted by Hunter SpellMod; all-ones reduces all Hunter player spells as the only viable approximation. Carrier AotH(13165) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER.

talent_affixes._todo: Aimed Shot (1r, tier 2) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Steady Shot (3r, tier 3) — After 2 consecutive Steady Shots, increases Aimed Shot damage by 5/10/15%. Proc (stacking counter mechanic), not implementable as SpellMod.
Rapid Killing (2r, tier 3) — On killing blow, reduces Rapid Fire cooldown by 2/4s and next Aimed/Steady Shot cast time -20%. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.

Mortal Shots (5r, tier 3) — Increases ranged weapon crit damage bonus by 6/12/18/24/30%. Ranged weapon crit multiplier; SPELLMOD_CRIT_DAMAGE_BONUS applies to spell crits only — not implementable as SpellMod.
Go for the Throat (2r, tier 4) — Your ranged crits give pet 25/50 Focus. Proc to pet resource, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Arcane Shot (3r, tier 4) — now id=461 in this file. Shared id=30 retired (see removedTalentAffixes).

talent_affixes.name: Improved Arcane Shot
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2048,0,0]=0x00000800 (mask0 bit11). No shared Hunter marker bits. Arcane Shot damage +5%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 5).

talent_affixes._todo: Readiness (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Serpent Sting
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16384,0,0]=0x00004000 (mask0 bit14). No shared Hunter marker bits. Serpent Sting damage +2%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 2).

talent_affixes._todo: Connective Fire (2r, tier 5) — Your Volley reduces the cooldown of Multi-Shot by 2/4s. Proc triggered by cast of Volley, not implementable as SpellMod.
Silencing Shot (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Tracking (5r, tier 6) — Increases damage done while tracking Beasts/Dragonkin/etc. by 1/2/3/4/5%. Conditional passive (tracking type), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Scatter Shot (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Master Marksman (5r, tier 6) — Increases ranged crit by 1/2/3/4/5%. Passive ranged crit stat; same scoping issue as Lethal Shots — all-ones variant already covered by main-file id=33.
Rapid Recuperation (2r, tier 7) — Rapid Fire and Rapid Killing restore 2/4 Focus every 2 sec. Proc-based periodic resource, not implementable as SpellMod.
Chimera Shot (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Wild Quiver (3r, tier 7) — Your ranged auto attacks have a 4/8/16% chance to instantly fire a bonus Arcane Shot. Proc-based bonus shot, not implementable as SpellMod.
Trueshot Aura (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
